title: Sysco to Webcast Presentation at the Jefferies 2022 Global Consumer Conference
text: HOUSTON, June 06, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) today announced that the Company will webcast its presentation at the Jefferies 2022 Global Consumer Conference on Monday, June 20, 2022, at 8:00 a.m. EDT.
